sentences.text: His garden was the most beautiful in the whole countryside, and everyone admired it.
There were many flowers like Sweet-william, Gilly-flowers, and Shepherds’-purses, which made the garden colorful.
You could also find damask Roses, yellow Roses, lilac Crocuses, and Violets in gold, purple, and white colors.
As the months passed, flowers like Columbine, Ladysmock, Marjoram, Wild Basil, Cowslip, Flower-de-luce, Daffodil, and Clove-Pink bloomed in their turn.
